I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19. You already have:

- One-on-One with Manager — 11:00–11:30 (confirmed)

So 10:00 is not available. The earliest one-hour slot that day is 11:30–12:30. Other possible one-hour options (assuming you want later in the day) are 12:30–13:30 or any afternoon time — let me know a preference.

Before I create the event, a few quick confirmations:
1. Do you want me to schedule it at 11:30–12:30 if 10:00 is unavailable? Or pick a different time (tell me which)?  
2. Title for the meeting (default suggestion: "Follow-up Meeting")?  
3. Who should be invited (participants' email addresses)? If you want the same attendees as the Project Kick-off, say so.  
4. Location or conferencing link (optional)?  
5. Short description — I can use this default: "Follow-up to discuss action items and next steps from the Project Kick-off." Would you like that or a custom description?

Tell me your choices and I’ll create the event.
